## TOP 10 ACTIONS (Ranked by Urgency)

### 1. [P0 DEMO BLOCKER] Fix Mercedes inventory query bug
Query is consuming 8K tokens vs 3K baseline, price field not loading. Root cause almost certainly an unbounded field list in the Supabase read node. Rebuild as N8N HTTP lookup node plus field map plus token guard. Target spec: single vehicle lookup returns only needed fields, full record capped at 3K tokens, price guaranteed present. Nothing else ships until this is green.

### 2. [P0 DISSERTATION] Log progress today and confirm deadline
4 days of silence. Open Personal-HQ/projects/dissertation/PROJECT.md. Log current chapter, word count, next milestone, and the hard deadline. If deadline is inside 30 days, block a 3hr deep work session this weekend and add it to pending-actions.md. This slot does not protect itself.

### 3. [P0 P2 ANCHOR] Prep Teresa demo package (phone-only, 5 to 7 min)
Teresa is Frankie's warmest insurance pro, $40 to $50K/mo personal producer, meeting window closes Apr 21. Build the phone-only demo script (no email, both founder numbers on admin, Flash read-only workflow account) plus a one-page leave-behind covering lead economics ($25 to $50/lead or $1K/wk retainer), Maya agent flow, and agent handoff. Ship both to Frankie by EOD so he can run the call any moment in the next 72h.

### 4. [P0 LEGAL] Draft in-house template pack v0.1
Strategy Law is dead, $10K quote non-economic pre-revenue. You are now the legal function. First deliverable is template pack v0.1: 6 vendor DPAs, pilot SOW, mutual NDA, retainer agreement, E&O rider language. California plus federal baseline, India common-law crossover notes, procedural law for non-resident US-citizen founder. Store in Oraya-AI-HQ/projects/oraya-labs/deliverables/legal-templates/.

### 5. [P1 PILOT] Fix warm and three-way transfer in Retell
Still broken since Mar 27. Cold transfer works (SIP invite). Warm connects with no advisor briefing. Three-way debrief glitches. Open Retell flow editor, audit transfer node parameters, test against +13103716100. This is the Mercedes pilot value prop. Log test results in deliverables/retell-transfer-tests-2026-04-18.md.

### 6. [P1 COST VALIDATION] Validate HiQ production latency + cost
LLM pivot Gemini to HiQ adds $0.05/min, which is +$250 per 1K calls. Enterprise pricing is supposed to absorb this but you need actual numbers. Run 50 outbound calls on HiQ, log average latency, total LLM spend, and compare to the Gemini baseline. Decision gate: keep HiQ only if latency improvement is material and margin stays above 85%.

### 7. [P1 MIGRATION AUDIT] N8N workflows on orayacorporation.app.n8n.cloud
Migration happened. Every production workflow, every Retell webhook, every Supabase trigger needs to be confirmed pointing at the new domain. Pull the list, click through each, verify the webhook URL, run one live test per flow. Any reference to hanfluxai2026.app.n8n.cloud in any code, doc, or dashboard text is a bug. Grep the repo.

### 8. [P1 REVENUE RAIL] Connect Stripe API key to Frankie's P2 lead gen funnel
Stripe is live ($0.37 first signal Apr 15). Admin invite accepted. Frankie built the UI. Only the API key wiring is missing. 30 minutes of work. Test with a $1 charge then refund. Log the test transaction ID. Without this, a Teresa yes cannot be captured.

### 9. [P1 PROMPT HYGIENE] Maya prompt leakage fix + live transfer ask
Maya leaks prompt on Gemini 3 Flash and GPT 5.2. Given the HiQ pivot on P1 and Claude IQ 4.5 on P2, hardcode the Maya LLM choice and add a system message guardrail plus input sanitizer. Ship the "ask to live transfer" feature in the same push. Document the LLM lock decision in PROJECT.md.

### 10. [P1 DASHBOARD] Push Apr 18 state to GitHub
Dashboard must reflect today's deltas: Stripe Admin accepted, Strategy Law killed, in-house legal bootstrap, HiQ pivot, N8N migration, Teresa lead inbound, Mazzio card captured, Retell RPA self-editing prompts live. Then push per protocol:
